[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [fonts](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeTileset](../../TextmodeTileset.md) / columns

# Accessor: columns

## Get Signature

```ts
get columns(): number;
```

Number of columns in the normalized glyph atlas.

### Returns

`number`

### Example
